<summary>创建events.md文件，存储5个2026技术会议信息</summary>



```python
content = """# Upcoming Tech Conferences 2026

| # | Conference Name | Date | Location | Website |
|---|----------------|------|----------|---------|
| 1 | SXSW 2026 (South by Southwest) | March 13-22, 2026 | Austin, Texas, USA | https://www.sxsw.com |
| 2 | Google I/O 2026 | May 14-15, 2026 | Mountain View, California, USA | https://io.google.com |
| 3 | TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 | September 21-23, 2026 | San Francisco, California, USA | https://techcrunch.com/events/ |
| 4 | Web Summit 2026 | November 2-5, 2026 | Lisbon, Portugal | https://websummit.com |
| 5 | AWS re:Invent 2026 | December 1-5, 2026 | Las Vegas, Nevada, USA | https://reinvent.awsevents.com |
"""
with open('events.md', 'w') as f:
    f.write(content)
print("events.md created successfully!")
import os
print(f"File exists: {os.path.exists('events.md')}")
print(f"File size: {os.path.getsize('events.md')} bytes")
